items.name: 3d-button
items.description: 3D push button with press/hover physics and 8 color variants: amber, emerald, rose, sky, violet, slate, coral, mint.

items.name: morph-button
items.description: A button that morphs its shape on hover using GSAP.

items.name: morph-image-button
items.description: A button that morphs an image mask on hover using GSAP.

items.name: shiny-button
items.description: A shiny button with hover effects.

items.name: mouse-follower-button
items.description: A button that follows the mouse cursor with hover effects.

items.name: border-gradient-button
items.description: A button with a gradient border effect.

items.name: premium-button
items.description: Neumorphic premium button with layered shadows and 8 color variants: neutral, dark, gold, mint, rose, sky, lavender, sand.

items.name: orange-premium-button
items.description: Glossy gradient button with soft glow and 8 color variants: orange, pink, emerald, violet, sky, ocean, gold, magenta.

items.name: blue-chrome-button
items.description: A chrome-style button with layered glow border and smooth motion.

items.name: stripe-button
items.description: A Stripe-inspired button with inset shadow effect.

items.name: learn-more-button
items.description: An animated learn more button with hover effects using Framer Motion.

items.name: visit-button
items.description: A compact visit button with label and icon swap on hover.

items.name: toggle-button
items.description: An animated toggle switch with spring physics using Framer Motion.

items.name: abhinav-bento-button
items.description: A large bento-style button.

items.name: event-timeline-bento-card
items.description: A bento-style event timeline summary card.

items.name: goe-button
items.description: A gooey SVG filter button effect using Framer Motion.

items.name: blur-toggle-button
items.description: A button with blur transition effect on toggle using Framer Motion.

items.name: matte-shadow-button
items.description: A dark matte button with layered depth shadow.

items.name: matte-dark-button
items.description: A matte dark button with #222 base and layered shadow depth.

items.name: metal-button
items.description: A metallic button with 8 metal variants: silver, chrome, gold, copper, bronze, titanium, rose-gold, gunmetal.

items.name: glass-button
items.description: A frosted glass button with gradient border and 10 color variants: blue, purple, emerald, rose, amber, cyan, lime, slate, red, indigo.

items.name: refraction-glass-button
items.description: A real glass button that refracts the content behind it via an feDisplacementMap lens, with chromatic edge fringe and specular sheen.

items.name: prism-glass-button
items.description: A thick domed glass button that refracts the content behind it via an feDisplacementMap lens, with a heavy chromatic-aberration fringe, frost and specular sheen. Draggable.

items.name: glass-square-button
items.description: A rounded-square frosted glass button with diagonal gradient border and 10 color variants: blue, purple, emerald, rose, amber, cyan, lime, slate, red, indigo.

items.name: glass-circle-button
items.description: A circular icon glass button with conic gradient ring and frosted core. 10 color variants and a swappable Lucide icon.

items.name: glass-icon-button
items.description: A frosted glass pill button with an embedded icon capsule. 10 color variants and a swappable Lucide icon.

items.name: cyber-button
items.description: A cyberpunk-style button with neon borders and glitch effects.

items.name: pixel-credits-button
items.description: A soft keycap-style button for Pixel Credits.

items.name: border-1
items.description: A dashed border design with corner elements.

items.name: border-2
items.description: A solid border design with corner elements.

items.name: intersection-1
items.description: A circular border with gradient intersection lines.

items.name: intersection-2
items.description: A scoped intersection design with patterned borders.

items.name: star-border
items.description: Star border decorator with animated corners.

items.description: Image trail mouse follower using GSAP.

items.name: mouse-follower-2
items.description: Mouse follower image trail with pure DOM.

items.name: text-fade

items.name: text-inertia
items.description: Text follows mouse with inertia using GSAP.

items.name: text-gradient
items.description: Gradient text effect using CSS.

items.description: Y-axis slide animation with stagger.

items.name: text-reveal

items.description: Text reveal animation variant.

items.name: text-black-hole

items.description: Random flicker then letters glow red and turn white.

items.name: text-broken-glass

items.name: text-glitch-portal
items.description: RGB split plus scale blur then collapse into clean text.

items.description: Types then deletes then types wrong then finally correct.

items.description: Y-axis text animation with blur using GSAP SplitText.

items.name: text-assemble
items.description: Text assembles from scattered pieces using GSAP ScrollTrigger.

items.name: success-ripple-animation
items.description: A looping success ripple animation with expanding rings and a checkmark draw.

items.name: orbit-dot-motion
items.description: A 3D orbiting dot animation with perspective and rotateY motion.

items.name: coin-spin-animation
items.description: A 3D spinning coin animation with layered faces and side depth.

items.name: activity-wheel-motion
items.description: Scrollable arc-curved vibe picker with violet active fill and a dark indicator pill.

items.name: car-lock-drive-motion
items.description: Side-view car with a clean lock/drive pill switch that springs the car forward on drive.

items.name: dial-knob-motion
items.description: Tactile rotary knob with layered bevel discs, two tick rings, and an amber dot-arc indicator. Drag or scroll to change value.

items.name: guitar-svg
items.description: Guitar SVG path effect animation.

items.name: cd
items.description: An animated ASCII CD render with responsive scaling.

items.name: book-demo-button
items.description: Lime square with animated dotted chevron arrows that expands a dark panel on hover to reveal a label.

items.name: glassy-button
items.description: Chunky square glass/metal button with vertical gradient ring, layered floating shadow, and animated press state with icon dimming.

items.name: rainbow-glowing-button
items.description: Dark pill button with a rainbow glow that auto-cycles through 6 color variants (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, pink) using radial blur and gradient stroke.

items.name: bevel-button
items.description: Compact dark button with a top-light to bottom-dark gradient stroke and layered inset bevel shadows for a tactile chiseled feel.

items.name: liquid-button
items.description: Frosted-glass pill button with gradient ring and a hover slide that swaps two stacked text labels.

items.name: soft-pill-button
items.description: Frosted-glass pill button with layered highlights, gradient border, and primary/secondary variants.

items.name: framer-cta-button
items.description: Framer-style CTA pill button with brand icon and dark/light variants.

items.name: liquid-gradient-button
items.description: Premium gradient button with image overlay, loading animation, and 8 color variants: pink, cyan, emerald, amber, crimson, violet, ocean, sunset.

items.name: radial-gradient-button
items.description: Radial gradient button with inset glow and 8 color variants: blue, purple, emerald, crimson, amber, cyan, violet, rose.

items.name: barwave-svg-animation
items.description: A bar wave SVG animation with interactive hover, using Framer Motion.

items.name: claude-sidebar
items.description: Claude-style sidebar built on shadcn/ui's <Sidebar> primitives. Smooth icon-rail collapse animation, playful icon micro-interactions on hover, starred & recent chat lists, user card with auto-tooltips when collapsed. Customizable via props (navItems, starred, recents, user).

items.description: Scroll-typography effect builders — faithful GSAP ScrollTrigger ports of the

items.description: Index component.

items.name: text-block-transitions
items.description: Codrops "Text Block Transitions" — faithful ports of all 12 demos from

items.name: gooey-text
items.description: Gooey text hover morph — faithful GSAP ports of the three Codrops

items.name: color-flair-button
items.description: A pill button with a directional color flair: stacked concentric circles bloom from

items.name: inertia-arrow-card
items.description: A notched card with a magnetic pill button: the pill flings with GSAP inertia in the

items.name: infinite-carousel
items.description: A seamless infinite carousel where one GSAP timeline powers idle drift, scroll-velocity speed/reverse, hover-slow, and drag-to-scrub — all sharing a single playhead so they never desync.

items.name: scroll-direction-carousel
items.description: An infinite carousel whose travel direction follows your scroll direction and whose speed ramps with scroll velocity before easing back to a gentle drift — one GSAP timeline with a scroll-signed timeScale.

items.name: cards-slider
items.description: Cards Slider — an infinite deck of product cards. The active card sits

items.name: radial-carousel
items.description: A radial arc carousel: cards fan along a circle's top arc and the whole wheel spins around its center as you scroll, carrying velocity momentum — every card shares one far-below transform-origin, so a single rotation value drives them all.

items.name: ring-carousel-3d
items.description: Ring Carousel 3D — image cards arranged around a circle in real 3D space

items.name: bend-image-reveal
items.description: A pixel-art frame that flies in and warps with an air-friction bend, deformed on a WebGL plane by a GSAP-driven vertex shader.

items.name: bend-zoom-reveal
items.description: A pixel-art frame that flies in, then zooms to fill the box as you scroll inside it, warping with an air-friction bend on a WebGL plane.

items.name: bend-mouse-follower
items.description: A pixel-art frame that smoothly chases the cursor and warps with an air-friction bend on a WebGL plane.

items.name: bend-button-follower
items.description: A rounded pill button with text that smoothly chases the cursor and warps with an air-friction bend on a WebGL plane.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.description: A magnetic button that eases toward the cursor inside its zone, demonstrating GSAP's overwrite modes (true / false / "auto") against an idle CustomWiggle loop.

items.name: rect-mask-reveal
items.description: A rectangular mask reveal — the image stays fixed while a clip-path inset rectangle grows from the center, keeping the video aspect ratio, to uncover the whole frame.

items.name: star-mask-reveal
items.description: A star-shaped mask reveal — a sparkle clip-path spins 360° once while scaling up from nothing to uncover the full image.

items.name: directional-mask-reveal
items.description: A directional mask reveal — the image wipes in from a chosen edge (top, bottom, left, or right) via an animated clip-path inset.

items.name: hero-cover-reveal
items.description: A scroll-driven hero cover reveal — the hero pins in place while the next section slides up and covers it, scrubbed by GSAP ScrollTrigger.

items.name: footer-reveal
items.description: A scroll-driven footer reveal — the footer sits pinned in place while the content above slides up to uncover it. Pure CSS sticky, no JS.

items.name: text-along-path
items.description: Text that slides around a curved SVG path as you scroll inside the card — a GSAP take on Olivier Larose's text-along-path, with eased catch-up via gsap.quickTo.

items.name: stacking-cards-parallax
items.description: A scroll-driven stacking card parallax — sticky cards pin and scale down as later cards scroll up over them, building a layered depth stack.

items.name: center-split-reveal
items.description: A center-split mask reveal — the image is clipped to a closed vertical seam down the middle, then the clip-path opens left and right to split it apart and uncover the whole frame.

items.name: pixel-cursor-trail
items.description: A pixelated cursor trail: hovered grid cells flash and fade, leaving a trail behind the mouse, with blend-mode text on top.

items.name: text-clip-mask-reveal
items.description: A scroll-driven text-clip mask reveal — a video is clipped to the shape of a word, and as you scroll the text-shaped mask scales up until it opens out and uncovers the full frame.

items.name: blinds-mask-reveal
items.description: A venetian-blinds mask reveal — the image is hidden behind N slats cut from a repeating-linear-gradient CSS mask, then every slat opens at once to uncover the whole frame.

items.name: clock-mask-reveal
items.description: A radial clock-sweep mask reveal — a conic-gradient CSS mask sweeps a wedge around the center like a clock hand, uncovering the image angle by angle until the full frame shows.

items.name: iris-mask-reveal
items.description: A camera-iris mask reveal — a circular clip-path opens from wherever you click and expands until it reaches the farthest corner, uncovering the full frame.

items.name: mosaic-mask-reveal
items.description: A mosaic mask reveal — the image is rebuilt from a grid of square tiles that pop in with a staggered order (from the center, edges, randomly, or a corner) until the picture is whole.

items.name: brush-mask-reveal
items.description: A brush-stroke mask reveal — the image is painted in along a thick snaking brush stroke, using an inline SVG mask whose stroked path animates its stroke-dashoffset from hidden to fully drawn.

items.name: pinwheel-mask-reveal
items.description: A pinwheel mask reveal — N wedges sweep open around the center like a windmill (or a camera shutter), cut from an animated repeating-conic-gradient mask, until the full frame shows.

items.name: sonar-mask-reveal
items.description: A sonar mask reveal — concentric rings cut from a repeating-radial-gradient CSS mask thicken outward from the center, filling the gaps between them, until the whole frame is uncovered.

items.name: spotlight-mask-reveal
items.description: A spotlight mask reveal — the image stays dark except for a soft circle that follows your cursor like a flashlight; click to flood the whole frame with light (and click again to dim back to the spotlight).

items.name: noise-mask-reveal
items.description: A fragment-shader noise mask reveal — the image dissolves in through a drifting cloud of fbm noise, with a warm grainy glow riding the dissolve edge. Click to replay.

items.name: noise-dissolve-reveal
items.description: A fragment-shader noise dissolve reveal — the image materialises in through a drifting cloud of fbm noise, with a warm grainy glow riding the dissolve edge. Click to replay.

items.name: gravity-image-trail
items.description: A GSAP image trail where images cascade from the cursor, fall, and bounce off the bottom edge.

items.name: scale-image-trail
items.description: A GSAP image trail that pops each image in with a bouncy scale, then shrinks it away behind the cursor.

items.name: image-trail-effects
items.description: A cursor image trail with six switchable reveal effects — flame, venetian, curtain, hexagon, liquid and zoom split.

items.name: image-trail-direction
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where each image slides in from the side the cursor is moving toward, then fades out.

items.name: image-trail-drop
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images chase the cursor, then fade and fall off the bottom edge.

items.name: image-trail-fade
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images ease toward the cursor, then fade and shrink away.

items.name: image-trail-scaleup
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images trail the cursor on a long ease, then fade while scaling up and out.

items.name: image-trail-slide
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images follow the cursor, then scatter off in random directions with a spin.

items.name: image-trail-squeeze
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where each image fades, squeezes thin and stretches tall as it drops away.

items.name: motion-trail-classic
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images appear at the cursor, glide to it, then scale and fade out.

items.name: motion-trail-exiting
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where each image pops in at the cursor, then exits upward with a random sideways drift.

items.name: motion-trail-flow
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images flare with brightness/contrast tied to speed, then drift off in the travel direction.

items.name: motion-trail-innerscape
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where the outer image grows in while its inner layer un-zooms from a bright over-scale.

items.name: motion-trail-persistence
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where blend-mode images linger in a stack and the oldest fades out as new ones arrive.

items.name: motion-trail-perspective
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images tilt in 3D and shift in depth based on the cursor's distance from center.

items.name: motion-trail-spin
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where images rotate to follow the cursor's heading and fling off along its path.

items.name: motion-trail-tile
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail where each image lands as a 3x3 grid of tiles that scatter and fade apart.

items.name: motion-trail-velocity
items.description: A GSAP cursor trail whose images grow, brighten, blur and desaturate in proportion to cursor speed.

items.name: mask-trail-blinds
items.description: A cursor trail where each image opens through venetian-blind slats cut from a repeating-linear-gradient mask, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-clock
items.description: A cursor trail where each image sweeps in like a clock hand via a conic-gradient mask, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-iris
items.description: A cursor trail where each image irises open from a growing circular clip-path, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-pinwheel
items.description: A cursor trail where each image blooms open through spinning windmill wedges via a conic-gradient mask, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-rect
items.description: A cursor trail where each image grows open from a centered clip-path rectangle, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-sonar
items.description: A cursor trail where each image resolves from the center outward through concentric rings cut from a repeating-radial-gradient mask, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-split
items.description: A cursor trail where each image splits open from a centered seam via an animated clip-path inset, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-star
items.description: A cursor trail where each image bursts open from a growing, spinning sparkle clip-path, then fades.

items.name: mask-trail-wipe
items.description: A cursor trail where each image wipes upward from its bottom edge via an animated clip-path inset, then fades.

items.name: spinning-cube-motion
items.description: A 3D cube continuously spinning on its Y axis, built with CSS 3D transforms and driven by Framer Motion.

items.name: fluid-cube-scroll
items.description: A scroll-driven 3D cube that slides across the viewport while a GPU fluid simulation masks its colourful faces in under the cursor.

items.name: raycaster-shapes
items.description: Geometries on a 3D plane: a raycaster lights up the hovered shape's edges with a Fresnel rim shader, and clicking pops it up and spins it.

items.name: floating-logo-intro
items.description: A 3D logo that draws itself in (SVG stroke), rises with an easeOutBack overshoot and floats, over a cursor-distorted pixel-text background, with a hover ink-bleed reveal and click "venom" takeover shader.

items.name: perspective-deck-carousel
items.description: A row of image cards fanned along a 3D diagonal that recedes up-and-to-the-right; it auto-slides, loops infinitely with no seam, and can be dragged to scrub.

items.name: fanned-deck-carousel
items.description: A tall row of image cards fanned along a flat diagonal (no depth recede); each card is angled about Y. It auto-slides, loops infinitely with no seam, and can be dragged to scrub.

items.name: red-fire
items.description: ASCII flame animation rendered in a red terminal style.

items.name: gradient-bottom-bloom
items.description: A radial bloom rising from the bottom of the frame.

items.name: gradient-chrome
items.description: A chrome metallic reflection built from a multi-stop conic gradient.

items.name: gradient-conic-sweep
items.description: A layered multi-conic sweep blending black and grey.

items.name: gradient-cool-aurora
items.description: A cool aurora of layered blue and cyan radial glows.

items.name: gradient-coral-blur
items.description: A coral linear gradient with a faint backdrop blur.

items.name: gradient-diagonal-pattern
items.description: A fine diagonal repeating-line micro pattern.

items.name: gradient-dot-mesh
items.description: A fixed radial dot-mesh texture with a subtle inset ring.

items.name: gradient-dual-grid
items.description: A dual-scale grid system with light and dark variants.

items.name: gradient-fiery-aurora
items.description: A fiery aurora of layered orange and yellow radial glows.

items.name: gradient-glow-fade
items.description: Radial glow that fades from a blue bloom at the top into white.

items.name: gradient-gold-sheen
items.description: A gold metallic sheen sweeping across the frame.

items.name: gradient-purple-blue
items.description: A purple-to-blue angled linear gradient.

items.name: gradient-purple-metal
items.description: A purple brushed-metal sheen via hard-light blended gradients.

items.name: gradient-steel-metal
items.description: A steel brushed-metal sheen via hard-light blended gradients.

items.name: gradient-sunset-glow
items.description: A warm sunset glow with a soft red inner shadow.

items.name: nexvyn-gradient
items.description: A soft purple-and-orange radial gradient.

items.name: progressive-blur
items.description: A progressive (layered) backdrop-blur fade, stacking eight masked blur layers.

items.name: silver-metallic
items.description: A soft silver metallic gradient with a faint backdrop blur.

items.name: aurora-curtain
items.description: Drifting ribbons of green and violet light over a deep night sky.

items.name: blob-sphere
items.description: A sphere displaced by 3D noise in the vertex shader — drag to spin.

items.name: cursor-spotlight
items.description: A noise-wobbled glow that tracks your cursor across the dark — hover to move it.

items.name: day-night-sky
items.description: A shader sky that glides from day to night — sun, moon, drifting clouds and stars, with an optional scrub slider.

items.name: dreamy-clouds
items.description: Soft photographic cumulus clouds drifting across a periwinkle-to-pink dream sky — layered for depth, with lit tops and cool shadowed undersides.

items.name: drifting-clouds
items.description: Soft warped fbm clouds rolling across a clear blue sky.

items.name: gentle-waves
items.description: A calm light-to-blue gradient rolling with slow, soft waves.

items.name: kaleidoscope
items.description: Eight-fold mirrored noise that slowly rotates through the spectrum.

items.name: liquid-caustics
items.description: Sunlight refracting through rippling water onto a pool floor.

items.name: liquid-metal
items.description: Layered domain warping that pools into a flowing chrome surface.

items.name: neon-rings
items.description: Pulsing, wobbling concentric rings glowing through a cosine spectrum.

items.name: plasma-flow
items.description: Classic interfering sine fields cycling through a vivid cosine palette.

items.name: seventies-melt
items.description: Iterated sine domain-warping melts the plane into a wobbling 70s lava haze.

items.name: shader-canvas
items.description: A reusable full-screen fragment-shader canvas powered by Three.js, with shared GLSL helpers (noise/fbm), time/mouse/resolution uniforms and optional GUI controls.

items.name: twisted-blob
items.description: A vertex-twisted sphere with domain-warped noise — drag to spin.

items.name: wave-lines
items.description: Stacked glowing sine lines drifting at staggered speeds through a cosine palette.

items.name: animated-texture
items.description: Helper that builds an animated (GIF/video-capable) Three.js texture for image shaders.

items.name: before-after
items.description: Drag the handle to wipe between two images with a liquid seam.

items.name: cursor-reveal
items.description: Drag to paint colour back into a B&W photo, or scratch off frosted glass — strokes linger.

items.name: cursor-trail-smear
items.description: Your cursor drags a liquid streak across the image that trails and fades.

items.name: flow-field
items.description: Particles stream along curl-noise currents that reform the image.

items.name: fluid-image
items.description: A real-time GPU fluid simulation — move your cursor to flow one image into another.

items.name: image-particles
items.description: The image is shattered into a drifting grid of particles — move your cursor to disturb them.

items.name: image-shader-canvas
items.description: A reusable image-shader canvas (Three.js) that loads one or two images, exposes time/mouse/progress uniforms and runs a custom fragment shader with cover-fit sampling.

items.name: img-anaglyph
items.description: Red/cyan stereo split driven by brightness-as-depth — grab your 3D glasses.

items.name: img-ascii-art
items.description: Rebuilds the image from terminal glyphs whose density tracks brightness.

items.name: img-ballpoint-drawing
items.description: A ballpoint-pen cross-hatch rendering — strokes follow the image's form on grainy paper with a vignette. Adapted (single-pass) from flockaroo, CC BY-NC-SA.

items.name: img-blinds-transition
items.description: Hover to flip open a stack of horizontal blinds, each strip wiping to the second image.

items.name: img-burn-dissolve
items.description: Hover and the first image burns away along a glowing ember edge, revealing the next through the noise.

items.name: img-checker-flip
items.description: Hover and the image tiles into a checkerboard whose squares flip over, staggered, to the next image.

items.name: img-chromatic-aberration
items.description: Red and blue channels drift apart toward the edges with a slow pulse.

items.name: img-comic-cel
items.description: Posterised flat colours with bold inked outlines — cel-shaded comic look.

items.name: img-crt-scanlines
items.description: Curved tube, scanlines, RGB fringe and a rolling bar — vintage television.

items.name: img-crystallize
items.description: Shatters the image into flat Voronoi cells with dark stained-glass leading.

items.name: img-depth-parallax
items.description: Fake 2.5D — brightness becomes depth, so the scene tilts as you move.

items.name: img-dot-matrix-scatter
items.description: An LED-style dot grid of the image — move your cursor to scatter the dots into a dispersing cloud.

items.name: img-duotone
items.description: Maps brightness onto a two-colour gradient that shifts through the spectrum.

items.name: img-edge-sketch
items.description: Sobel edge detection lights up the outlines in their own colour on black.

items.name: img-engraving
items.description: Renders the image as inked woodcut hatch-lines on warm paper.

items.name: img-gameboy
items.description: Four-shade DMG green palette with ordered dithering and chunky pixels.

items.name: img-glass-shatter
items.description: The image is cracked into Voronoi glass shards — move your cursor to blow them outward, leaving dark leading between the pieces.

items.name: img-glitch
items.description: Random horizontal slices tear and shift with bursts of RGB noise.

items.name: img-halftone
items.description: Rebuilds the image from ink dots that grow where the picture is darker.

items.name: img-hex-mosaic
items.description: Pixelates the image onto a honeycomb grid of hexagons.

items.name: img-ink-bleed
items.description: Colour blooms outward from your cursor like ink dropped into water.

items.name: img-kaleidoscope
items.description: Folds the image into six-fold mirrored symmetry that slowly rotates.

items.name: img-led-dot-matrix
items.description: Rebuilds the image from a grid of glowing round LEDs on a black panel.

items.name: img-liquid-transition
items.description: Hover to ripple both frames through a flowing noise warp as one dissolves into the other.

items.name: img-low-poly
items.description: Flat-shades the image across a grid split into triangles, geometric-art style.

items.name: img-magnifier-lens
items.description: A fish-eye loupe follows your cursor, zooming the image right beneath it.

items.name: img-oil-paint
items.description: Kuwahara filtering smears the image into soft painterly brush strokes.

items.name: img-ordered-dither
items.description: Bayer-matrix ordered dithering crunched down to a few colour levels.

items.name: img-pixel-dissolve
items.description: The image materialises from chunky mosaic blocks into full resolution.

items.name: img-pixel-distortion
items.description: Move your cursor to crunch the image into chunky pixel blocks that jitter, distort and RGB-split around the pointer.

items.name: img-pixel-melt-transition
items.description: Hover to crunch both images into chunky mosaic blocks that flip over, staggered, into the second.

items.name: img-pixel-rise-reveal
items.description: Hover and a ragged wall of pixels climbs from the bottom, dissolving the old image block by block as the new one rises into place.

items.name: img-pixelate
items.description: Snaps the image to a square grid whose resolution breathes over time.

items.name: img-posterize
items.description: Flattens the image into a handful of colour bands, screen-print style.

items.name: img-ripple-reveal
items.description: Hover to send a rippling ring out from the centre, warping the first image aside as the next floods in.

items.name: img-ripple
items.description: Concentric water ripples radiate from your cursor and warp the image.

items.name: img-shery-cyber-squares
items.description: Retro cyber squares pulse across the image and brighten around your cursor. Adapted from Shery.js (style 7), MIT — Sheryians Coding School.

items.name: img-shery-liquid-cursor
items.description: A flowing liquid distortion that bends around your cursor. Adapted from Shery.js (style 5), MIT — Sheryians Coding School.

items.name: img-shery-liquid
items.description: A mesmerising simplex-noise liquid warp drifting across the image. Adapted from Shery.js (style 1), MIT — Sheryians Coding School.

items.name: img-shery-perlin
items.description: A pulsing Perlin-noise displacement that breathes the image in and out. Adapted from Shery.js (style 6), MIT — Sheryians Coding School.

items.name: img-shery-wind
items.description: A natural simplex-noise sway, like the image fluttering in a breeze. Adapted from Shery.js (style 4), MIT — Sheryians Coding School.

items.name: img-spotlight-reveal
items.description: A flashlight of full colour follows your cursor through a darkened image.

items.name: img-thermal-vision
items.description: Maps brightness onto an infrared heat ramp — cold indigo to white-hot.

items.name: img-twirl
items.description: Swirls the pixels into a spinning vortex centred on your cursor.

items.name: img-vhs
items.description: Tape warble, chroma bleed and a rolling tracking band — worn-out VHS.

items.name: img-wave
items.description: Gently ripples the whole image like a flag in a slow breeze.

items.name: img-wipe-reveal
items.description: Hover to sweep a glowing diagonal seam across the frame, wiping one image into the next.

items.name: img-zoom-blur-transition
items.description: Hover to punch through a radial zoom-blur — the first image streaks outward as the second rushes in.

items.name: inertia-particles
items.description: Move your cursor to shove the particles aside — a damped spring snaps them back.

items.name: jelly-bulge
items.description: A glassy lens of jelly follows your cursor, magnifying the image.

items.name: liquid-melt
items.description: Hover to heat the image — the columns you linger over sag and melt.

items.name: magnetic-swarm
items.description: Particles are sucked into a swirling swarm around your cursor.

items.name: magnetic-warp
items.description: The image gathers toward your cursor like iron filings, then relaxes back.

items.name: paint-reveal
items.description: A pencil sketch paints itself in with organic, noisy brush edges.

items.name: pixel-distortion
items.description: Move your cursor to smear the image pixels along a relaxing grid.

items.name: ripple-touch
items.description: Move or click to drop water ripples that expand and refract the image.

items.name: vortex-pull
items.description: A whirlpool chases your cursor with momentum — it lags, then catches up.
